steps.title: Compare the proposed causes
steps.content: The goal is not just to name two theories. The sentence must compare what each theory says causes crown shyness.

steps.title: Include both mechanisms
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B name the theories without explaining the causes. Choice D explains only Ellison's mutual abrasion theory. The remaining sentence places Ellison's branch-brushing cause against Lim's shade-detection cause. The answer is C.
